KATAIFI WRAPPED LAMB | sesame aioli
STUFFED ONION DOLMA | rice, peppers, currants, feta
CURED KINGFISH | bullhorn peppers, lime, shallot & garlic dressing, bulgur crackers
BEETROOT SALAD | roasted grapes, labne, macadamia & aleppo dressing
SPANNER CRAB MANTI | yoghurt, spiced butter, sumac
CHARRED BROCCOLI SKEWERS | pumpkin seed tarator, kishk, kefir ranch
BBQ CHICKEN THIGH SKEWERS | preserved lemon toum, whipped tahini
SLOW-ROASTED LAMB RIBS | charred tomato jam, pomegranate molasses, labne
SLOW ROASTED CELERIAC | pickled fennel salad, burnt fennel butter, isot pepper

MARKET FISH | green mango amba, pea tabouli

TRIPLE COOKED CHIPS | aleppo pepper, garlic & oregano
SPRING SALAD | mixed leaves, cucumber, tomato, shallot & herb dressing
